name: Nora Al-Saud

action: Schedule an urgent one-on-one session with Nora today or tomorrow to assess her understanding gaps, review the failed quiz content, and create a targeted 6-day study plan for the upcoming quiz.
reasoning: Nora has never been contacted despite critical risk status and a quiz failure (17/100), indicating she may feel isolated and unsupported. With only 6 days until the next quiz and 100% attendance showing commitment, immediate intervention can prevent further failure and build confidence through personalized support.
